description: Open Forms, Open Zaak, Open Notificaties and Objects API logs

targets.expr:
sum(
    count_over_time (
        {app="objecten"}
        |= "POST /api/v2/objects"
        | json event="event", request="request", code="code"
        | event = "request_finished"
        | request = "POST /api/v2/objects"
        | code >= 400
        [$__range]
    ) 
) or vector(0)

sum(
    count_over_time (
        {app="openzaak"}
        |= "POST /zaken/api/v1/zaken"
        | json event="event", request="request", code="code"
        | event = "request_finished"
        | request = "POST /zaken/api/v1/zaken"
        | code >= 400
        [$__range]
    ) 
) or vector(0)

panels.title: Open Forms stats by registration plugin

targets.expr:
sum by (path, status)(
    count_over_time (
        {app="openzaak"}
        |= "request"
        |= "/api/"
        | json event="event", method="method", path="path", status="status"
        | event = "request"
        | path=~".*/api/.*"
        | method!~"GET|HEAD"
        | label_format path=`{{ regexReplaceAllLiteral "[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12}" .path "<uuid>" }}`                
        [$__range]
    )
)

{app="openformulieren-worker"}
|= "registration_success"
| json 
| event="registration_success"
| action="registrations.main_registration"
{app="openformulieren-worker"} | json | event="registration_failure"

{app="objecten"}
|= "object_created"
| json event="event", object_uuid="object_uuid", token_identifier="token_identifier"
| event = "object_created"

{app="objecten"}
| json event="event", request="request", code="code", request_id="request_id", title="title"
| event="request_finished"
| request="POST /api/v2/objects"
| code >= 400

{app="objecten"}
| json
| event="api.handled_exception"
| status >= 400

{app="opennotificaties-worker"}
|= "notification_successful"
| json  event="event", subscription_callback="subscription_callback", channel_name="channel_name", action="action", resource="resource", resource_url="resource_url"
| event="notification_successful"

{app="opennotificaties-worker"}
|= "notification_"
| json event="event", resource="resource", action="action", resource_url="resource_url", subscription_callback="subscription_callback", channel_name="channel_name", task_attempt_count="task_attempt_count", http_status_code="http_status_code"
| event=~"notification_failed|notification_error"

{app="openzaak"} 
|= "zaak_created"
| json event="event", identificatie="identificatie", zaaktype="zaaktype"
| event="zaak_created"

{app="openzaak"}
|= "POST /zaken/api/v1/zaken"
| json event="event", request="request", code="code", request_id="request_id"
| event = "request_finished"
| request = "POST /zaken/api/v1/zaken"
| code >= 400

title: Monitoring en logging (with structlog)
